product_overview: ROSAutoAsia is an online auto parts store for Kyrgyzstan (raa.kg) built with Next.js and TypeScript, providing catalog browsing, product details, cart/checkout, account management and an admin panel backed by mock data.
core_goals: Provide a fast, mobile-first product catalog and search for auto parts specific to local vehicle models.
Enable simple account authentication (phone + password) and persistent cart/favorites using localStorage.
Support a straightforward checkout flow with delivery and payment selection.
Offer admin capabilities for viewing and managing orders and store statistics.
Keep implementation simple and testable using mock data and REST-style API routes under the app.

features.name: Homepage
features.description: Landing page showing hero, category grid, featured product cards and trust signals to guide users into catalog or promotions.
user_flows: GET http://localhost:3000/api/categories -> Receive 200 with list of categories and counts -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/products?featured=true -> Receive 200 with featured products
GET http://localhost:3000/api/categories -> Receive 200 with list -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/products?category=nonexistent -> Receive 200 with empty array (no featured products)

features.name: Catalog
features.description: All categories grid with icons and product counts so users can jump into a category.
user_flows: GET http://localhost:3000/api/categories -> Receive 200 with 8 categories including icon and productCount -> GET http://localhost:3000/catalog (client-side route) renders categories
GET http://localhost:3000/api/categories -> Receive 200 with empty or malformed data (server error) -> Receive 500 with error; client shows fallback 'Unable to load categories' message

features.name: Category Products
features.description: List of products for a category with sidebar filters (brand, price, availability).
user_flows: GET http://localhost:3000/api/categories/engine-oil/products?page=1&limit=24 -> Receive 200 with product list and total -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/filters?category=engine-oil -> Receive 200 with available brands and price ranges
GET http://localhost:3000/api/categories/invalid-slug/products?page=1 -> Receive 404 product list not found

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: Detailed product page with image gallery, specifications, quantity selector, add-to-cart and similar products.
user_flows: GET http://localhost:3000/api/products/12345 -> Receive 200 with product details, images and specs -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/products/12345/similar -> Receive 200 with similar products
GET http://localhost:3000/api/products/99999 -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Search
features.description: Search results page with filter chips and a 'not found' request form for missing items.
user_flows: GET http://localhost:3000/api/search?q=brake+pad&page=1 -> Receive 200 with matching products and facets -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/search/suggestions?q=bra -> Receive 200 with suggestions

GET http://localhost:3000/api/search?q=unobtanium -> Receive 200 with empty results -> POST http://localhost:3000/api/requests/not-found with {name:'unobtanium', phone:'+996...'} -> Receive 201 request created

features.name: Cart
features.description: Cart page listing items with quantity controls, order summary and promo code application.
user_flows: POST http://localhost:3000/api/cart with {productId:12345, quantity:2} -> Receive 201 with updated cart -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/cart -> Receive 200 with cart items and totals
POST http://localhost:3000/api/cart with {productId:out-of-stock, quantity:1} -> Receive 400 with error 'Product not available'

features.name: Checkout
features.description: Customer form, delivery and payment selection, and order confirmation.
user_flows: GET http://localhost:3000/api/cart -> Receive 200 with cart contents -> POST http://localhost:3000/api/checkout with {customer, deliveryMethod, paymentMethod, cartId} -> Receive 201 with orderId and confirmation
POST http://localhost:3000/api/checkout with missing customer phone -> Receive 400 validation error

features.name: Login
features.description: Phone + password login form to authenticate users; token persisted to localStorage by the client.
user_flows: POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login with {phone:'+996700000000', password:'secret'} -> Receive 200 with {token, user} -> Subsequent requests use Authorization: Bearer <token>
POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login with {phone:'+996700000000', password:'wrong'} -> Receive 401 with 'Invalid credentials'

features.name: Register
features.description: User registration with name, phone, email and password to create an account.
user_flows: POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/register with {name:'Ivan', phone:'+996700111222', email:'ivan@example.kg', password:'pwd1234'} -> Receive 201 with {token, user}
POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/register with existing phone '+996000000000' -> Receive 409 conflict 'Phone already registered'

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Password recovery initiated via phone number (send code or reset link).
user_flows: POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/forgot with {phone:'+996700111222'} -> Receive 200 with 'resetCodeSent' -> POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/reset with {phone, code, newPassword} -> Receive 200 password updated
POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/forgot with unregistered phone '+996999999999' -> Receive 404 'Phone not found'

features.name: Account
features.description: User profile and order history accessible to authenticated users.
user_flows: POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/account/profile with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with profile
GET http://localhost:3000/api/account/profile without Authorization header -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Admin
features.description: Admin panel for viewing and managing orders and store stats (requires admin credentials).
user_flows: POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login with admin credentials {phone:'+996000000000', password:'admin123'} -> Receive 200 with token -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/admin/orders with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with order list
GET http://localhost:3000/api/admin/orders with non-admin token -> Receive 403 forbidden

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Saved products list for quick access and later purchase.
user_flows: POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST http://localhost:3000/api/favorites with Authorization: Bearer <token> and {productId:12345} -> Receive 201 favorite added -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/favorites with token -> Receive 200 with favorites array
POST http://localhost:3000/api/favorites without token -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Select Car
features.description: Step-by-step vehicle selector (brand, model, year) to filter compatible parts.
user_flows: GET http://localhost:3000/api/cars/brands -> Receive 200 with list of car brands -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/cars/brands/Toyota/models -> Receive 200 with models -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/cars/models/Corolla/years -> Receive 200 with years
GET http://localhost:3000/api/cars/brands/UnknownBrand/models -> Receive 404 brand not found

features.name: About
features.description: Company information, mission, statistics and values rendered from static or API-provided content.
user_flows: GET http://localhost:3000/api/content/about -> Receive 200 with about page content -> Client displays company info and stats
GET http://localhost:3000/api/content/about when content missing -> Receive 404; client shows default static text fallback

features.name: Delivery
features.description: Delivery methods, payment options and FAQ supporting selection during checkout.
user_flows: GET http://localhost:3000/api/delivery/methods -> Receive 200 with delivery options and costs -> GET http://localhost:3000/api/payments/methods -> Receive 200 with payment options
GET http://localhost:3000/api/delivery/methods returning 500 -> Receive 500 server error; checkout shows 'Unable to load delivery methods'

features.name: Contacts
features.description: Contact information, map and feedback form for customer inquiries.
user_flows: GET http://localhost:3000/api/content/contacts -> Receive 200 with phone, address and map coordinates -> Client displays contact card and map
POST http://localhost:3000/api/feedback with {name:'Aida', phone:'+996...', message:'Question'} -> Receive 201 feedback submitted
POST http://localhost:3000/api/feedback with empty message -> Receive 400 validation error
